query:
-- Move all session 19 trades to 60 days ago so they don't pollute Daily/Weekly/Monthly yield
UPDATE paperTrades 
SET closedAt = DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 60 DAY)
WHERE userId = 1 AND sessionId = 19;

-- Also move session 19 positions closedAt to 60 days ago
UPDATE paperPositions
SET closedAt = DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 60 DAY)
WHERE userId = 1 AND sessionId = 19 AND status = 'closed';

-- Verify: no session 19 trades in last 30 days
SELECT COUNT(*) as recentSession19 
FROM paperTrades 
WHERE userId = 1 AND sessionId = 19 AND closedAt >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 30 DAY);

UPDATE paperTrades 
SET closedAt = DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 60 DAY)
WHERE userId = 1 AND sessionId = 19;

-- Also move session 19 positions closedAt to 60 days ago
UPDATE paperPositions
SET closedAt = DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 60 DAY)
WHERE userId = 1 AND sessionId = 19 AND status = 'closed';

-- Verify: no session 19 trades in last 30 days
SELECT COUNT(*) as recentSession19 
FROM paperTrades 
WHERE userId = 1 AND sessionId = 19 AND closedAt >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 30 DAY);
